title: Assistant Store Manager - Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services:
Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services!
